description: Negative/error-path: After reconnect following mid-turn transport drop, the turn state is "error" or absent from activeTurn. Client surfaces JSON-RPC error code -32601.
notes: Auto-generated from D7 negative paths: transport.disconnect.edge.in-progress-turn-failed. When the transport drops mid-turn, in-progress turns SHOULD be marked failed by the server.

steps.label: send reconnect to trigger the error condition
